home.tagline: नवीन मोबाइल ऐप्स और जायरोस्कोप संचालित गेम्स
home.meta_description: PineSoft नवीन मोबाइल ऐप्स और जायरोस्कोप गेम्स बनाता है. ऑडियो विश्लेषण, दुर्लभ भाषा संरक्षण, और 20 गेम्स.
home.games_desc: जायरोस्कोप संचालित गेम्स. पहेली, कौशल, ऐक्शन और अधिक.
home.tools_desc: ऑडियो विश्लेषण, संगीत ट्यूनिंग और उपयोगिता ऐप्स.
home.reading_desc: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं का डिजिटल संरक्षण.
home.about_p1: PineSoft नवीन मोबाइल ऐप्स और जायरोस्कोप गेम्स बनाता है. AI ऑडियो विश्लेषण से दुर्लभ भाषाओं के संरक्षण तक, और 20 गेम्स जो आपके फोन को कंट्रोलर में बदल देते हैं.
home.about_p2: हमारे सभी उत्पाद परिवार-अनुकूल हैं, वयस्क विज्ञापनों के बिना, और कई भाषाओं का समर्थन करते हैं.
home.business_p1: PineSoft इटली में स्थित एक स्वतंत्र मोबाइल ऐप डेवलपर है, जो Google Play और Apple App Store पर ऐप्स और गेम प्रकाशित करता है। हमारे ऐप्स मुफ्त डाउनलोड के लिए उपलब्ध हैं, Google AdMob के माध्यम से गैर-दखलंदाज़ बैनर विज्ञापनों द्वारा समर्थित, विज्ञापन हटाने और Pro सुविधाओं जैसी प्रीमियम सुविधाओं को अनलॉक करने के लिए वैकल्पिक इन-ऐप खरीदारी के साथ।
home.business_p2: हम उपयोगकर्ता अधिग्रहण अभियान चलाने के लिए Google Ads प्लेटफ़ॉर्म का उपयोग करते हैं, Google Search, YouTube और Google Display Network पर नए उपयोगकर्ताओं के लिए हमारे ऐप्स का प्रचार करते हैं। Google Ads API हमें इन अभियानों को प्रोग्रामेटिक रूप से प्रबंधित करने, प्रदर्शन मेट्रिक्स की निगरानी करने और हमारे विज्ञापन खर्च को कुशलतापूर्वक अनुकूलित करने में सक्षम बनाता है।
home.business_p3: पूछताछ, साझेदारी या API संबंधित प्रश्नों के लिए, हमसे support@pinesoft.dev पर संपर्क करें।

games.title: गेम्स
games.meta_description: PineSoft से जायरोस्कोप संचालित गेम्स. 20 गेम्स: पहेली, कौशल, ऐक्शन.
games.subtitle: फोन को झुकाकर खेलें. 20 गेम्स जो जायरोस्कोप को कंट्रोलर में बदल देते हैं.
games.gyro2048_desc: क्लासिक 2048 पहेली जायरोस्कोप नियंत्रण के साथ. फोन झुकाकर टाइल्स को स्लाइड करें, नंबर मिलाएं और 2048 तक पहुंचें.

tools.title: टूल्स
tools.meta_description: PineSoft से ऑडियो विश्लेषण और संगीत टूल्स.
tools.subtitle: ऑडियो विश्लेषण, संगीत और उत्पादकता ऐप्स.

soundscope.desc: AI ध्वनि पहचान के साथ रियल-टाइम ऑडियो स्पेक्ट्रोग्राम. 521 ध्वनि श्रेणियां पहचानता है.

polytuner.desc: रियल-टाइम पिच डिटेक्शन के साथ पॉलीफोनिक गिटार ट्यूनर.

reading.title: पठन
reading.meta_description: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों का डिजिटल संरक्षण. PineSoft.
reading.subtitle: दुर्लभ और शास्त्रीय पाठ्यों का डिजिटल संरक्षण.

horatio.desc: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों का डिजिटल संरक्षण. 19 कैलेंडर, 10+ लिपि, पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन.

gyro2048.meta_description: TODO: The classic 2048 puzzle reimagined with gyroscope controls. Tilt your phone to slide tiles, merge numbers, and reach 2048. Free on Google Play.
gyro2048.og_description: TODO: The classic 2048 puzzle with gyroscope controls. Tilt your phone to play. Free on Google Play.
gyro2048.subtitle: TODO: The classic 2048 puzzle reimagined with gyroscope controls. Tilt your phone to play.
gyro2048.feat_gyro_desc: TODO: Tilt your phone to slide the tiles. A completely new way to play 2048 using your device's motion sensors.
gyro2048.feat_touch_desc: TODO: No gyroscope? No problem. Swipe to play with classic touch controls. Switch between modes anytime.
gyro2048.feat_gpg_desc: TODO: Compete on leaderboards and unlock achievements. See how your score compares with players worldwide.
gyro2048.feat_score_desc: TODO: Track your current score and all-time best. Game progress is saved automatically.
gyro2048.feat_lang_desc: TODO: Full interface in English, Italian, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese.
gyro2048.feat_family_desc: TODO: No adult advertisements, no in-app purchases required. Safe for all ages.
gyro2048.privacy_text: TODO: Gyro 2048 processes gyroscope data locally on your device. No motion data is ever recorded, stored, or transmitted to external servers.
gyro2048.cta_free: TODO: Free on Google Play. No account required.

soundscope.meta_title: TODO: Real-time Spectrogram with AI Sound Recognition
soundscope.meta_description: TODO: See what you hear. Real-time audio spectrogram with AI-powered sound recognition. Identify 521 sound classes, create Spectrogram Art, and explore 5 scientific colormaps.
soundscope.og_description: TODO: See what you hear. Real-time spectrogram with AI that identifies 521 sound types. Free on Google Play.
soundscope.twitter_description: TODO: See what you hear. Real-time spectrogram with AI that identifies 521 sound types.
soundscope.subtitle: TODO: See what you hear. Real-time spectrogram with AI-powered sound recognition.
soundscope.feat_ai_desc: TODO: Powered by YAMNet, identifies 521 sound classes in real-time — birds, instruments, traffic, appliances and more.
soundscope.feat_art_desc: TODO: Turn images into sound! Play shapes that appear as art on another phone's spectrogram. 9 built-in presets, or upload your own image with Pro.
soundscope.feat_colormap_desc: TODO: 5 perceptually uniform colormaps: Inferno, Viridis, Magma, Plasma, and Classic.
soundscope.feat_spectrum_desc: TODO: 20 Hz to 20 kHz logarithmic spectrogram with adaptive frequency labels. Blackman-Harris windowing for -92 dB sidelobe suppression.
soundscope.feat_gps_desc: TODO: Record outdoor sound walks with GPS coordinates. View detected sounds plotted on a map along your route. Pro feature.
soundscope.feat_noise_desc: TODO: Adaptive per-bin spectral subtraction removes background noise, revealing what matters.
soundscope.feat_presets_desc: TODO: Quick-switch between Birding, Speech, Music, and Full Range modes to focus on what you're listening for.
soundscope.feat_lang_desc: TODO: Full interface and all 521 detection labels in EN, IT, DE, FR, ES, PT, JA, KO, ZH.
soundscope.feat_recording_desc: TODO: Record audio as WAV files with one tap. Recordings are saved locally on your device — never uploaded or shared.
soundscope.feat_widget_desc: TODO: See the last detected sound at a glance without opening the app.
soundscope.art_intro: TODO: Play a sound file and watch hidden images appear on your friend's spectrogram. A fun way to share visual messages through sound.
soundscope.art_caption_logo: TODO: PineSoft logo as Spectrogram Art
soundscope.changelog_art: TODO: Spectrogram Art — play images as sound, see shapes on the spectrogram
soundscope.changelog_gps: TODO: GPS Sound Recording with map view and detection pins
soundscope.changelog_range: TODO: Full 20 kHz range with adaptive frequency labels
soundscope.changelog_presets: TODO: Frequency presets: Birding, Speech, Music, Full Range
soundscope.changelog_scroll: TODO: Detection labels scroll to latest on new detection
soundscope.changelog_widget: TODO: Home screen widget for last detected sound
soundscope.changelog_db: TODO: Improved dB level meter accuracy
soundscope.changelog_detection: TODO: AI Sound Detection with compact and overlay display modes
soundscope.changelog_colormaps: TODO: 5 scientific colormaps: Inferno, Viridis, Magma, Plasma, Classic
soundscope.changelog_noise: TODO: Adaptive noise suppression (Auto & Manual modes)
soundscope.changelog_languages: TODO: 9 languages for UI and all 521 detection labels
soundscope.coming_bird_desc: TODO: Identify 14,795 bird species by sound. AI cascade: YAMNet detects "Bird", then a specialized neural network identifies the exact species.
soundscope.coming_slm_desc: TODO: Calibrated dB meter with noise heatmap on the GPS map. See which areas are noisiest along your route.
soundscope.coming_bg_desc: TODO: Keep recording sounds and GPS data in the background with a foreground service. Never miss a detection.
soundscope.privacy_text: TODO: All audio is processed locally on your device. Optional recordings are saved on-device only — never uploaded or shared with anyone.
soundscope.cta_free: TODO: Free on Google Play. No account required.

horatio.meta_description: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों का डिजिटल संरक्षण. 19 कैलेंडर, 12 लिपि, पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन. PineSoft.
horatio.og_description: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों को संरक्षित करें और पढ़ें. पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन.
horatio.twitter_description: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों को संरक्षित करें और पढ़ें. पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन.
horatio.subtitle: दुर्लभ, लुप्तप्राय और शास्त्रीय भाषाओं में पाठ्यों को संरक्षित करें और पढ़ें. पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन, खाता आवश्यक नहीं.
horatio.feat_texts_desc: घटती या रुकी हुई संपादकीय गतिविधि वाली भाषाओं में लिटर्जिकल और शास्त्रीय पाठ. आने वाली पीढ़ियों के लिए डिजिटल संरक्षण.
horatio.feat_calendars_desc: रोमन, कॉप्टिक, मोज़ारेबिक, इथियोपियन, यहूदी, इस्लामी, शैक्षिक, धार्मिक संघों और धर्मप्रांतीय कैलेंडर.
horatio.feat_bible_desc: Vulgata Clementina (लैटिन), Martini 1781 और Diodati 1607. विधान, श्रेणी, पुस्तक और अध्याय के अनुसार खोजें.
horatio.feat_multiscript_desc: लैटिन, अरबी, हिब्रू, सीरियाई, कॉप्टिक, गीज़, ग्रीक, गॉथिक, आर्मेनियाई, देवनागरी और अन्य.
horatio.feat_search_desc: सभी स्थापित पाठ्यों में तुरंत परिणामों के साथ खोजें. कोई भी अंश, जात या प्रार्थना खोजें.
horatio.feat_packs_desc: मॉड्यूलर स्थापना — केवल वही भाषाएँ और पाठ डाउनलोड करें जो आपको चाहिए. हल्का और कुशल.
horatio.feat_dark_desc: चिंतनशील पठन के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया. दिन और रात आँखों के लिए आरामदायक.
horatio.feat_private_desc: कोई खाता नहीं, कोई ट्रैकिंग नहीं, कोई विज्ञापन नहीं. सभी सामग्री आपके डिवाइस पर स्थानीय रूप से संसाधित और संग्रहीत होती है.
horatio.feat_hours_desc: Daily office assembler for Lauds, Vespers, and Compline. Navigate by date, browse the assembled liturgy with proper BMD formatting.
horatio.feat_quality_desc: Each content pack displays its source quality: original text, machine translation, or scholarly edition. Know what you are reading.
horatio.scripts_intro: बंडलेड Noto Sans फ़ॉन्ट्स के साथ मूल लिपि प्रणालियों में पाठ पढ़ें.
horatio.privacy_text: Horatio पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन है. कोई डेटा नहीं एकत्र किया, प्रेषित या साझा किया जाता है. खाता आवश्यक नहीं, विज्ञापन नहीं, ट्रैकिंग नहीं.
horatio.languages_modern: लैटिन, इतालवी, जॉर्जियन, माल्टीज़, अरबी, कॉप्टिक, सीरियाई, हिब्रू, प्राचीन ग्रीक, चर्च स्लाविक आदि.
horatio.packs_intro: केवल वही भाषाएँ और पाठ इंस्टॉल करें जो आपको चाहिए. सभी पैक निःशुल्क हैं और पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन काम करते हैं.
horatio.packs_note: ऐप के अंदर पैक मैनेजर से पैक ब्राउज़ और इंस्टॉल करें.
horatio.packs_more: और भाषा पैक जल्द आ रहे हैं
horatio.pack_georgian_desc: जॉर्जियन लिपि में घंटों की प्रार्थना
horatio.pack_prayers_lat_desc: Traditional Catholic prayers in Latin: Pater Noster, Ave Maria, Rosary, and more.
horatio.pack_prayers_ita_desc: Traditional Catholic prayers in Italian: Padre Nostro, Ave Maria, Rosario, and more.
horatio.packs_catalog_meta: Horatio के सभी 41 सामग्री पैक देखें: बाइबल, पाठ, प्रार्थना पुस्तकें, भजन और प्रार्थनाएँ, 19 भाषाओं में।
horatio.packs_catalog_subtitle: सभी उपलब्ध पैक देखें। श्रेणी, भाषा या स्रोत गुणवत्ता से संशोधन करें।
horatio.packs_search_placeholder: नाम, भाषा या विवरण से पैक खोजें...
horatio.packs_no_results: वर्तमान संशोधनों से कोई पैक मेल नहीं खाते।
horatio.packs_showing: {total} में से {n} पैक दिखाए जा रहे हैं
horatio.feedback_title: आपकी प्रतिक्रिया Horatio को आकार देती है
horatio.feedback_body: क्या आपके पास सुविधाओं के लिए विचार हैं, कोई पाठ त्रुटि मिली है, या अपनी भाषा में अनुवाद में योगदान करना चाहते हैं? हम आपसे सुनना चाहेंगे।

general.title: TODO: Privacy Policy
general.meta_description: TODO: Privacy policy for all PineSoft apps — games, tools, and reading apps.
general.heading: TODO: Privacy Policy
general.intro: TODO: ("we", "our", "us") develops and operates mobile applications. This privacy policy covers all PineSoft apps, including:
general.app_soundscope: TODO: Real-time audio spectrogram with AI sound recognition
general.app_horatio: TODO: Digital preservation of texts in rare, endangered, and classical languages
general.intro_specific: TODO: Each app may also have its own specific privacy policy page linked above. This general policy describes how we collect, use, and share information across all PineSoft apps.
general.info_collect_intro: TODO: Our apps use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect:
general.advertising_id_desc: TODO: A unique, anonymous identifier used to serve relevant ads.
general.device_info_desc: TODO: Device model, operating system version, and screen size for ad formatting.
general.usage_data_desc: TODO: Ad interaction data (views, clicks) for analytics.
general.no_personal_info: TODO: We do not collect personal information such as your name, email address, or phone number. Game scores and preferences are stored locally on your device only.
general.how_use_intro: TODO: Information collected through AdMob is used solely for:
general.how_use_ads: TODO: Displaying advertisements within our apps
general.how_use_analytics: TODO: Measuring ad performance and analytics
general.third_party_intro: TODO: Our apps use the following third-party services that may collect data:
general.your_choices_intro: TODO: You can manage your ad preferences:
general.ad_personalization_desc: TODO: You can opt out of personalized ads through your device settings (Settings > Google > Ads > Opt out of Ads Personalization).
general.consent_desc: TODO: On first launch, you will be asked for consent to data collection for advertising purposes (EEA/UK users).
general.children_text: TODO: Our apps are not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
general.data_retention_text: TODO: We do not store any personal data on our servers. All app data (scores, preferences) is stored locally on your device and can be deleted by uninstalling the app.
general.gdpr_intro: TODO: If you are in the European Economic Area or United Kingdom, you have the right to:
general.gdpr_access: TODO: Access, correct, or delete your personal data
general.gdpr_withdraw: TODO: Withdraw consent at any time
general.gdpr_complaint: TODO: Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
general.changes_text: TODO: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
general.contact_text: TODO: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us:

gyro2048.title: TODO: Privacy Policy — Gyro 2048
gyro2048.meta_description: TODO: Privacy policy for Gyro 2048, the gyroscope-controlled puzzle game by PineSoft.
gyro2048.heading: TODO: Privacy Policy
gyro2048.intro: TODO: is developed by PineSoft. This privacy policy explains how Gyro 2048 handles your data.
gyro2048.row_personal_purpose: TODO: No account required to play
gyro2048.row_gyro_purpose: TODO: Game controls — processed on device, never transmitted
gyro2048.row_progress_purpose: TODO: Saved on device for continuity
gyro2048.row_leaderboards_purpose: TODO: Google Play Games (Android) / Game Center (iOS)
gyro2048.row_crash_purpose: TODO: Anonymous crash reporting (Google Play / Apple)
gyro2048.gyroscope_intro: TODO: Gyro 2048 uses your device's gyroscope and accelerometer sensors for gameplay controls. This motion data is:
gyro2048.gyroscope_on_device: TODO: Processed entirely on your device in real-time
gyro2048.gyroscope_never_transmitted: TODO: Never recorded, stored, or transmitted to any server
gyro2048.gyroscope_tile_movement: TODO: Used only to determine tile movement direction during gameplay
gyro2048.gyroscope_no_background: TODO: Not captured when the app is in the background
gyro2048.leaderboards_intro: TODO: Gyro 2048 optionally integrates with platform game services (Google Play Games on Android, Game Center on iOS) for leaderboards and achievements. If you sign in:
gyro2048.leaderboards_scores: TODO: Your scores are submitted to platform leaderboards
gyro2048.leaderboards_achievements: TODO: Achievement progress is tracked by the platform
gyro2048.leaderboards_platform_policy: TODO: This data is governed by the platform's privacy policy
gyro2048.leaderboards_optional: TODO: You can play without signing in — leaderboards and achievements are entirely optional.
gyro2048.advertising_text: TODO: Gyro 2048 displays advertisements through Google AdMob. AdMob may use anonymous device identifiers to serve relevant ads. We do not serve adult or inappropriate advertisements. All ads are family-friendly.
gyro2048.advertising_review: TODO: You can review Google AdMob's privacy practices at:
gyro2048.iap_text: TODO: Gyro 2048 may offer optional purchases (e.g., "Remove Ads") through your device's app store (Google Play or Apple App Store). These transactions are processed entirely by the respective platform and are subject to their privacy policies
gyro2048.iap_no_payment_info: TODO: PineSoft does not receive any personal payment information.
gyro2048.data_sharing_text: TODO: We do not sell, share, or transmit any personal data to third parties. Game data and scores remain on your device unless you opt into platform game services (leaderboards).
gyro2048.data_retention_text: TODO: Game progress and scores are stored locally on your device. Uninstalling the app removes all locally stored data.
gyro2048.children_text: TODO: Gyro 2048 is designed to be family-friendly and suitable for all ages. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. The app complies with COPPA requirements.
gyro2048.rights_intro: TODO: Gyro 2048 does not collect personal data on external servers. The only data processed externally is anonymous advertising identifiers by Google AdMob and optional leaderboard scores via platform game services.
gyro2048.rights_under_law: TODO: Under GDPR (EEA/UK) and CCPA (California), you have the right to:
gyro2048.rights_access: TODO: Access, rectify, or delete any personal data
gyro2048.rights_opt_out: TODO: Opt out of personalized advertising (via device settings)
gyro2048.rights_disconnect: TODO: Disconnect platform game services at any time
gyro2048.rights_complaint: TODO: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority
gyro2048.rights_exercise: TODO: To exercise these rights, contact us at
gyro2048.changes_text: TODO: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance.
gyro2048.contact_text: TODO: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us:

soundscope.title: TODO: Privacy Policy — SoundScope
soundscope.meta_description: TODO: Privacy Policy for SoundScope by PineSoft. How we handle your data, microphone access, and GPS recording.
soundscope.heading: TODO: Privacy Policy
soundscope.what_does_text: TODO: SoundScope is a real-time audio spectrogram and sound recognition app. It uses your device's microphone to visualize audio frequencies and identify sounds using on-device AI.
soundscope.microphone_intro: TODO: SoundScope requires microphone access to function. All audio is processed entirely on your device:
soundscope.mic_realtime: TODO: Audio is captured, analyzed, and displayed in real-time
soundscope.mic_classification: TODO: Sound classification (YAMNet, 521 classes) runs locally via TensorFlow Lite
soundscope.mic_manual_record: TODO: Audio recording is manual only — you must explicitly tap a record button to save audio
soundscope.mic_foreground_only: TODO: Recording only works while the app is in the foreground — no background recording
soundscope.mic_local_storage: TODO: Recorded audio is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to external servers
soundscope.mic_close_stops: TODO: When you close the app, audio capture stops immediately
soundscope.gps_intro: TODO: SoundScope offers an optional GPS Sound Recording feature:
soundscope.gps_explicit: TODO: Location data is collected only when you explicitly start a GPS recording session
soundscope.gps_local: TODO: GPS coordinates are stored locally on your device in JSON format
soundscope.gps_never_transmitted: TODO: Location data is never transmitted to external servers
soundscope.gps_delete: TODO: You can delete recorded sessions at any time from within the app
soundscope.samples_text: TODO: When you save a sound sample, the audio snippet is stored locally on your device. Saved samples are never uploaded or shared unless you explicitly choose to share them using your device's share functionality.
soundscope.advertising_text: TODO: SoundScope displays advertisements through Google AdMob. AdMob may use anonymous device identifiers to serve relevant ads. We do not serve adult or inappropriate advertisements. All ads are family-friendly.
soundscope.advertising_review: TODO: You can review Google AdMob's privacy practices at:
soundscope.data_sharing_text: TODO: We do not sell, share, or transmit any personal data to third parties. Audio, GPS, and sound sample data remains entirely on your device.
soundscope.summary_audio_desc: TODO: Processed locally, never stored or transmitted
soundscope.summary_gps_desc: TODO: Stored locally when user starts recording, never transmitted
soundscope.summary_device_desc: TODO: Used only by Google AdMob for ad serving and by the platform for anonymous crash reporting
soundscope.data_retention_text: TODO: Audio is processed in real-time and never stored. GPS recordings and saved sound samples are stored locally on your device. Uninstalling the app removes all locally stored data. You can also delete individual recordings from within the app at any time.
soundscope.children_text: TODO: SoundScope is designed to be family-friendly. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. The app complies with COPPA requirements.
soundscope.rights_intro: TODO: SoundScope does not collect personal data on external servers. Audio and GPS data remains entirely on your device. The only data processed externally is anonymous advertising identifiers by Google AdMob.
soundscope.rights_under_law: TODO: Under GDPR (EEA/UK) and CCPA (California), you have the right to:
soundscope.rights_access: TODO: Access, rectify, or delete any personal data
soundscope.rights_opt_out: TODO: Opt out of personalized advertising (via device settings)
soundscope.rights_complaint: TODO: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority
soundscope.rights_exercise: TODO: To exercise these rights, contact us at
soundscope.changes_text: TODO: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
soundscope.contact_text: TODO: If you have questions about this privacy policy or SoundScope's data practices, contact us at:

horatio.title: TODO: Privacy Policy — Horatio
horatio.meta_description: TODO: Privacy policy for Horatio, the rare and classical language texts app by PineSoft.
horatio.heading: TODO: Privacy Policy
horatio.intro: TODO: is developed by PineSoft. This privacy policy explains how Horatio handles your data.
horatio.row_preferences_purpose: TODO: Font size, theme, calendar — stored on device
horatio.row_content_purpose: TODO: Downloaded texts stored on device
horatio.row_search_purpose: TODO: Full-text search index on device
horatio.how_used_heading: TODO: How Your Data Is Used
horatio.how_used_intro: TODO: Horatio processes all data locally on your device. No data is transmitted to external servers. The app works completely offline after initial content pack downloads.
horatio.how_used_preferences: TODO: Reading preferences (font size, theme, selected calendar) are stored in local app storage and never transmitted.
horatio.how_used_content_packs: TODO: Content packs (.htx files) are stored locally in the app's private directory.
horatio.how_used_search: TODO: Full-text search uses a local SQLite FTS5 index on your device.
horatio.third_party_intro: TODO: Horatio does not use any third-party services that collect data:
horatio.third_party_no_firebase: TODO: No Firebase Analytics or Crashlytics
horatio.third_party_no_tracking: TODO: No third-party tracking or advertising SDKs
horatio.data_sharing_text: TODO: We do not sell, share, or transmit any personal data to third parties. All data remains on your device.
horatio.data_retention_text: TODO: All data is stored locally on your device. Uninstalling the app removes all stored data, including preferences and downloaded content packs.
horatio.children_text: TODO: Horatio is suitable for all ages. We do not collect personal information from anyone, including children under 13. The app complies with COPPA requirements.
horatio.rights_intro: TODO: Since Horatio does not collect or store any personal data on external servers, there is no personal data to access, rectify, delete, or port. All data is under your full control on your device.
horatio.rights_questions: TODO: If you have questions about your data rights, contact us at the email below.
horatio.iap_text: TODO: Horatio may offer optional tip jar purchases through your device's app store (Google Play or Apple App Store). These transactions are processed entirely by the respective platform and are subject to their privacy policies
horatio.iap_no_payment_info: TODO: PineSoft does not receive any personal payment information.
horatio.changes_text: TODO: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance.
horatio.contact_text: TODO: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us:
